---
id: v-2-access
title: "Get the access bundle"
description: "The signed-in user's offline access bundle: their units with evaluated access state, the entry points for their zones, the NFC keys, and the facility timezone. Authenticated with the user's Bearer token. Cache it and refresh on launch / pull-to-refresh."
sidebar_label: "Get the access bundle"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/kiss-api-reference
custom_edit_url: null
---

import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get the access bundle"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/access"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



The signed-in user's offline access bundle: their units with evaluated access state, the entry points for their zones, the NFC keys, and the facility timezone. Authenticated with the user's Bearer token. Cache it and refresh on launch / pull-to-refresh.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./v-2-access.RequestSchema.json")}
>
